description: Audit Tor Browser's handling of navigator.serviceWorker and localStorage by creating a directory at /home/ga/web_audit/ and authoring a test page at /home/ga/web_audit/index.html. The page must check for serviceWorker availability and manage a localStorage key named 'audit_token' (writing a value if it is absent). Host this page via a local server on port 8080, logging all output to /home/ga/Documents/server.log. Document the initial API behavior observed in Tor Browser to /home/ga/Documents/initial_audit.txt. After a complete browser restart, verify the persistence of the localStorage data and record the findings in /home/ga/Documents/restart_audit.txt.
